steps.name: Select '0626.190905 test request company' company using filter
Select '0626.190905 test request merchant' business unit using filter
Set start and end date: 01-05-2025 to 07-05-2025
Select currency USD from dropdown menu
Select Card type 'VISA' from dropdown menu
Verify: merchant ID is sent to the server
